column3: unit: CNY. Must be based on the officially stamped quotation document

column1: # - total_price: Total price = price_per_unit x quantity
#   - pass: Inspection report qualified and no visible quality issues
#   - conditional_pass: Inspection report qualified but visible quality concerns exist (must annotate)
#   - fail: Inspection report unqualified or serious quality defects exist

column2: brief description. Fill N/A if no issues

column3: enum: A / B+ / B / C / New supplier

column1: #   - Budget is based on the Q1 Remaining of the corresponding category in the Google Sheets budget spreadsheet
#   - Scoring dimensions: Price(30) + Quality(25) + Delivery Period(15) + Qualification(15) + Historical Record(15)
#   - Price score = 30 x (lowest quote / this supplier's quote)
#   - recommended: within_budget=yes AND iso_status=valid AND quality_rating=pass
#   - conditional: within_budget=yes AND iso_status=valid AND quality_rating=conditional_pass (quality concerns need further confirmation)
#   - not_recommended: Over budget OR certification expired OR quality_rating=fail OR delivery period exceeds project requirements
